# ChatGPT Plus / Pro China Guide by ChongGrok

> A first-party service guide and independent knowledge base for ChatGPT Plus and Pro subscription recharge in China. ChongGrok is not affiliated with OpenAI.

## Primary service

- ChatGPT recharge page: https://chonggrok.com/chatgpt
- Card-key verification page: https://chonggrok.com/verify
- Full Free / Go / Plus / Pro comparison: https://chonggrok.com/blog/chatgpt-taocan-free-go-plus-pro-2026

- Main guide: {{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/

- English guide: {{ site.url }}{{ site.baseurl }}/en/

## Current plan facts

- ChatGPT Plus is 20 USD per month according to OpenAI's current help page.
- OpenAI currently lists 5x Pro at 100 USD per month and 20x Pro at 200 USD per month.
- The two Pro tiers include the same core Pro capabilities; their primary difference is usage allowance relative to Plus.
- Free and Go remain valid lower-cost choices. ChongGrok's ChatGPT service currently covers Plus and Pro membership recharge, not Go.
- Official source: https://help.openai.com/en/articles/9793128-what-is-chatgpt-pro
- Official pricing: https://chatgpt.com/pricing/

## Scope and safety

- Membership subscription recharge only; no API credits.
- No ready-made accounts, SMS verification, or bulk registration.
- Passwords, email verification codes, and recovery codes are not requested.
- A session credential is sensitive. It is submitted only through the verified recharge flow and should be refreshed by signing out and back in after completion.
- No online service is risk-free. This site does not promise zero risk or guaranteed account outcomes.
